user.title: Select vent brand
user.description: Choose your smart vent brand. Select Manual if you do not have smart vents and want recommended apertures.

flair_auth.title: Connect to Flair
flair_auth.description: Enter the OAuth 2.0 Client ID and Client Secret from your Flair developer app. The app must use the client_credentials grant type. If you see scope errors, your app may be missing permissions.

structure.title: Select structure
structure.description: Choose which Flair structure (home) to manage.

manual_count.title: Manual vent count
manual_count.description: Enter how many vents you want to manage manually.

manual_vents.title: Manual vent setup
manual_vents.description: Provide a name, thermostat, and temperature sensor for each vent.

error.auth: Authentication failed. Check the Client ID/Secret and OAuth app type.
error.invalid_client: OAuth credentials are invalid or not authorized for client_credentials.
error.invalid_grant: OAuth grant is invalid. Verify the client credentials and grant type.
error.invalid_scope: Your OAuth app does not allow one or more required scopes. Ask Flair to enable missing scopes.
error.rate_limited: Flair rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.
error.timeout: Flair did not respond in time. Check connectivity and try again.
error.server_error: Flair returned a server error. Try again later.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Flair. Check network access and try again.
error.no_structures: No structures were found for this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.

menu.title: HVAC Vent Optimizer options
menu.description: Choose which settings to configure. Start with brand selection, then DAB & polling.

algorithm_settings.title: Algorithm & polling
algorithm_settings.description:
Tune Dynamic Airflow Balancing (DAB) and polling behavior.

**Core settings:** Use DAB, force manual mode, close inactive rooms, granularity, polling intervals, initial efficiency, notifications.

**Control strategies:** dab (airflow curve), cost (linear + penalties), stats (learned model), hybrid (picks lowest-cost).

**Tuning guide for movement reduction:**
- deviation_threshold: Lower = more responsive but more moves. Default 0.5°C.
- deadband: Higher = fewer moves but less precise. Default 15%.
- max_recalc_per_cycle: Lower = more stable but less adaptive. Default 3.
- max_adjustment_batches_per_cycle: Hard cap on adjustment bursts within one HVAC run. Default 3.
- max_adjustment_batches_per_window: Hard cap on repeated adjustments across short cycling. Default 4.
- adjustment_window_minutes: Rolling time window for the batch cap. Default 120 min.
- temp_error_override: Higher = anti-chatter honored more often. Default 1.0°C.
- min_adjustment_percent: Can be reduced if deadband is active. Default 10%.
- min_adjustment_interval: Less important with steady-state hold. Default 30 min.

data.dab_enabled: Use Dynamic Airflow Balancing (automatic vent control)
data.dab_force_manual: Force vendor structure mode to manual while DAB is enabled
data.close_inactive_rooms: Close vents in rooms marked inactive
data.poll_interval_active: Polling interval while HVAC is active (minutes)
data.poll_interval_idle: Polling interval while HVAC is idle (minutes)
data.initial_efficiency_percent: Initial efficiency percent for new rooms
data.notify_efficiency_changes: Notify when efficiency values are adjusted
data.log_efficiency_changes: Write efficiency adjustments to the logbook
data.control_strategy: Control strategy (dab, cost, stats, hybrid, balance)
data.temp_error_override_c: Temperature error (C) that overrides hold rules
data.deadband_percent: Position deadband (%) — don't move a vent if the new target is within this % of current position
data.deviation_threshold_c: Deviation threshold (°C) — hold vent positions if room temps track within this tolerance
data.max_recalc_per_cycle: Max recalculations per HVAC cycle before positions are locked
data.max_adjustment_batches_per_cycle: Max vent adjustment batches per HVAC cycle
data.max_adjustment_batches_per_window: Max vent adjustment batches in rolling window
data.adjustment_window_minutes: Rolling window length for vent adjustment cap (minutes)
data.safety_floor_pct: Airflow safety floor (%) — minimum combined open airflow the balance strategy will never drop below (20–90)
data.spread_guardrail_c: Spread guardrail (°C) — hold positions while active-room spread is at or below this (0.2–5.0)
data.spread_improvement_deadband_c: Spread improvement deadband (°C) — only move vents if predicted spread improves by at least this (0.0–2.0)
data.crosscoupling_enabled: Cross-coupling — close satisfied rooms to feed an airflow-limited room
data.airflow_limited_margin_pct: Airflow-limited margin (%) — how close to full open counts as pinned (0–20)
data.airflow_limited_error_c: Airflow-limited error (°C) — minimum off-target error to flag a pinned room (0.1–3.0)
data.short_cycle_gap_min: Short-cycle gap (minutes) — reuse the prior cycle anchor across idle gaps shorter than this (0–60)

vent_assignments.title: Vent assignments
vent_assignments.description:
Assign a thermostat and (optionally) a temperature sensor and door/window sensor for each vent. Found {vent_count} vents.

- Thermostat: the HVAC system serving that vent.
- Temperature sensor (optional): overrides room temperature for DAB.
- Door/Window sensor (optional): adjusts the room's learning context when open (e.g. doors-open heat exchange).
- If no sensor is selected, the vendor room temperature is used.

context_settings.title: Context sources
context_settings.description:
Optional environmental sources that improve learning and balancing.

- Outdoor temperature: a sensor (numeric °C/°F) or a weather entity. Used to pick the outdoor band (cold / mild / hot) for context-aware efficiency learning. Leave unset to default to the mild band.

data.outdoor_temp_entity: Outdoor temperature sensor or weather entity (optional)

conventional_vents.title: Conventional vent counts
conventional_vents.description:
Enter how many non-smart vents exist for each thermostat. This prevents total airflow from dropping too low when DAB closes vents.

Important: Enter a realistic count. Extreme or incorrect values can reduce airflow and potentially stress your HVAC system. Allowed range: 0-50. If you have more than 50, split by system or contact support for guidance.

brand_manual.title: Vent brand & manual setup
brand_manual.description: Select the vent brand. Choose Manual to enter your vents, thermostats, and sensors.

manual_count.title: Manual vent count
manual_count.description: Enter how many vents you want to manage manually.

manual_vents.title: Manual vent setup
manual_vents.description: Provide a name, thermostat, and temperature sensor for each vent.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to load vents from the vendor API. Check your connection and credentials.
error.no_assignments: Please assign thermostats to vents before setting conventional vent counts.
